attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: chat
attributes.gen_ai.provider.name: anthropic
attributes.gen_ai.system_instructions: You are a helpful ecommerce support agent for ShopFast. You can look up orders, process returns, and answer product questions. Always be polite and concise. Never share other customers' data.
attributes.gen_ai.input_messages: [{"role": "user", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "Hi, I placed order #ORD-98712 two days ago. Can you tell me where it is?"}]}]
attributes.gen_ai.output_messages: [{"role": "assistant", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "Let me look up your order status right away."}, {"type": "tool_call", "content": "{\"name\": \"lookup_order\", \"arguments\": {\"order_id\": \"ORD-98712\"}}"}]}]

Can you tell me where it is?"}]}, {"role": "assistant", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "Let me look up your order status right away."}, {"type": "tool_call", "content": "{\"name\": \"lookup_order\", \"arguments\": {\"order_id\": \"ORD-98712\"}}"}]}, {"role": "tool", "parts": [{"type": "tool_call_response", "content": "{\"order_id\": \"ORD-98712\", \"status\": \"shipped\", \"carrier\": \"FedEx\", \"tracking_number\": \"FX-7891234560\", \"estimated_delivery\": \"2024-06-20\", \"items\": [{\"name\": \"Wireless Headphones\", \"qty\": 1, \"price\": 79.99}]}"}]}]

[{"role": "assistant", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "Great news! Your order #ORD-98712 has been shipped. Here are the details:

You can track your package using the FedEx tracking number above. Is there anything else I can help you with?"}]}]
